title: xylopia holtzii
intro: Xylopia holtzii, also known as West African black pepper or African black pepper, is a plant species belonging to the Annonaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Xylopia holtzii include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Xylopia holtzii is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its essential oil is also extracted for use in aromatherapy and as a flavoring agent.
